title: 9 women lawyers selected for Indian Litigation Fellowship 2026-2027
description: 9 lawyers have been selected for the Indian Litigation Fellowship 2026-2027, a program that aims to provide financial and mentorship support to empower young, first-generation women litigators at the start of their careers.This year, nearly 900 applications were received for just 10 positions. The organisers noted that a majority of applicants highlighted significant structural and socio-economic barriers to entering and sustaining a career in litigation.For the 2026–2027 cycle, out of the 9 can
